user.title: PalLight — Discover Device
user.description: Click Submit to auto-discover PalLight devices on your network. Or enter a Device ID (from SZiRain app Settings → About Device) to search for a specific device.

data_description.broadcast_ip: Interface on the same subnet as the device. Auto works for single-NIC installs.
data_description.device_id: Leave blank to auto-discover. 32-char hex string, e.g. 985b157bf6fc43368a63467ea3b19d0d

manual.title: Manual Entry
manual.description: Discovery did not find device ID {device_id}. Enter the IP and MAC address manually (check your router's DHCP client list).

name.title: Name Your Device
name.description:
Found: {device}

Enter a friendly name for this light. This becomes the entity ID — {example}.

restore_mode.title: Startup Behaviour
restore_mode.description: Choose what state the light should be in when Home Assistant restarts.

error.no_devices_found: Device not found on the network. Check it is powered on and the correct interface is selected. You can enter the IP and MAC manually below.
error.invalid_device_id: Device ID must be a 32-character hex string. Find it in the SZiRain app under Settings → About Device.
error.name_required: Enter a name for the device.

data_description.friendly_name: Changing this renames the entity. Re-add the card if you do.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to check device connectivity. Minimum 10 s.
data_description.broadcast_ip: Interface on the device subnet. Auto for single-NIC installs.
data_description.restore_mode: State applied to the device when HA restarts.

error.name_required: Enter a name for the device.
